note: This is the SOLE source of truth for bucket assignments. No prose overrides this table.

replaced.reason: Low headroom (6%) + redundant second C++ bucket. rs-errors provides 47.5% headroom, keyword_only weakness, stronger improvement detection.

analysis_denominators.primary_improvement_holdout: Only holdout probes with holdout_role=improvement_sensitive count. Buckets: B1 (2 probes), B2 (2 probes), B4 (3 probes). Total: 7 probes.
analysis_denominators.regression_sentinel_holdout: Holdout probes with holdout_role=regression_sentinel reported separately. Buckets: B1 (2), B2 (2), B3 (3), B4 (1), B5 (3). Total: 11 probes.
analysis_denominators.note: Rust (B3, B5) holdout is all-ceiling due to structural domain distribution. This is disclosed, not a split defect. No manual override applied (Option C rejected).

weakness_type_note: weakness_type met minimum diversity rules (2 types: keyword_only, none) but is low-entropy on this corpus. 3/5 anchors are none. Analyses should not over-interpret weakness_type as a high-resolution semantic stratifier.
